criteria.criterion: Station placed at correct path; slug matches ^[a-z0-9]+(-[a-z0-9]+)*$
Type recorded as universal|dedicated; dedicated has a bound sector; type never guessed
P06/P23/P24 structure matches the chosen type and every folder traces to the ontology (no invented structure)
CLAUDE.md exists and is <=70 lines, achieved by linking out not inlining
No pre-existing file modified without --force after a reviewed diff
Registry maps station<->slug<->type<->path with no duplicate slug or path; re-run is idempotent
Exactly one Alfa-core evidence family used per file; no prices; single-brand (JM Labs); no client PII
